creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
This isn't a fetchmail problem, but a problem in the base system between 
OpenSSL and the Heimdal Kerberos libraries.  It can affect ports other than 
fetchmail as well.

   See http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=145769 for a more detailed 
explanation.

   Rebuilding security/openssl and enabling MD2 does work around the problem.

~crh

On 2011-10-01, Chris Rees wrote:
>Maintainer of mail/fetchmail,
>
>Please note that PR ports/161184 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161184
>
>Chris Rees
>
